hooks.command: ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-superproject-working-tree 2>/dev/null); cd "${ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)}" && uv run python ci/hooks/check_forbidden_commands.py
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-superproject-working-tree 2>/dev/null); cd "${ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)}" && uv run python ci/hooks/check_test_file_pairing.py
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-superproject-working-tree 2>/dev/null); cd "${ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)}" && uv run python ci/hooks/tdd_guard.py
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-superproject-working-tree 2>/dev/null); cd "${ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)}" && uv run python ci/hooks/protect_platform_headers.py
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-superproject-working-tree 2>/dev/null); cd "${ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)}" && uv run python ci/hooks/lint-on-save.py
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-superproject-working-tree 2>/dev/null); cd "${ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)}" && uv run python ci/hooks/auto_test_suggest.py
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-superproject-working-tree 2>/dev/null); cd "${ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)}" && uv run python ci/hooks/compile_example.py
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-superproject-working-tree 2>/dev/null); cd "${ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)}" && uv run python ci/hooks/check-on-start.py
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-superproject-working-tree 2>/dev/null); cd "${ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)}" && uv run python ci/hooks/check-on-stop.py
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-superproject-working-tree 2>/dev/null); cd "${ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)}" && uv run python ci/hooks/desktop_notify.py
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-superproject-working-tree 2>/dev/null); cd "${ROOT:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)}" && uv run python ci/hooks/git_context.py
